sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88001" key="promeso/zeucis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προμεσόζευξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n88001.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">figure of speech in which the principal verb is placed both at the beginning and in the middle of the sentence,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sacerd.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.456K.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
